title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.360 - Director — appointment, qualification, duties
text:
43.360.  Director — appointment, qualification, duties. — The superintendent of the Missouri state highway patrol shall appoint from the membership of the patrol, a director of the division of drug and crime control who shall be responsible for the operation of the division.
(L. 1983 S.B. 294 § 2)
